headline: Illumia Names Laura Newell-McLaughlin Chief Operating Officer
summary: SCOTTSDALE, Ariz., May 19, 2026--Illumia names longtime company leader Laura Newell-McLaughlin COO to oversee operational unification and advance AI transformation priorities.
